channel.title: GitHub Clojure Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Clojure in GitHub

item.title: metabase/metabase
item.description: The simplest, fastest way to get business intelligence and analytics to everyone in your company 😋

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source(frontend now, backend later) platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Desktop app download link: https://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases, roadmap: https://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: tonsky/FiraCode
item.description: Free monospaced font with programming ligatures

item.title: roclisp/roclisp
item.description: The roclisp.org site.

item.title: status-im/status-react
item.description: a free (libre) open source, mobile OS for Ethereum

item.title: LightTable/LightTable
item.description: The Light Table IDE ⛺

item.title: nubank/clj-bigpanda
item.description: A clojure library for BigPanda Alerts and Deployments

item.title: nubank/matcher-combinators
item.description: Library for creating matcher combinator to compare nested data structures

item.title: nubank/k8s-api
item.description: Kubernetes client, data driven

item.title: nubank/clj-github-app
item.description: A library to implement GitHub Apps in Clojure.

item.title: nubank/basic-microservice-example
item.description: Simple sketch of how we layout a clojure microservice

item.title: nubank/state-flow
item.description: Integration testing framework using a state monad in the backend for building and composing flows

item.title: nubank/docopt.clj
item.description: Clojure implementation of the docopt description language

item.title: nubank/selvage
item.description: Testing at the edges with a world-transition style integration test framework

item.title: nubank/ordnungsamt
item.description: helping maintain order and consistency across code-bases

item.title: nubank/workspaces
item.description: Live development environment for Clojurescript

item.title: babashka/babashka
item.description: Native, fast starting Clojure interpreter for scripting

item.title: zendesk/clj-headlights
item.description: Clojure on Beam

item.title: adamtornhill/code-maat
item.description: A command line tool to mine and analyze data from version-control systems

item.title: broadinstitute/react-cljs-modal
item.description: Modal UI Component in React CLJS

item.title: clojure/clojurescript
item.description: Clojure to JS compiler

item.title: reagent-project/reagent
item.description: A minimalistic ClojureScript interface to React.js
